hero.subtitle: I design and ship agentic AI systems, RAG pipelines and cloud-integrated backends — from data ingestion to deployment.
hero.status: Available for opportunities · Based in Penang, Malaysia · EN / 中文

about.title: About
about.body: I'm Chuah Wen Han, a Computer Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) graduate from UCSI University with a final CGPA of 3.90 and Dean's List recognition in every eligible semester. I'm currently a Graduate Talent on Intel's ECG AI & Cloud Remote Solutions Engineering team, where I build enterprise-scale agentic AI systems, RAG pipelines and cloud-integrated backends. I work end to end — frontend, backend, databases and deployment — and enjoy turning complex engineering problems into reliable, production-grade AI services.

jobs.role: Graduate Talent — ECG AI & Cloud Remote Solution Engineer
jobs.description: Full-stack AI engineer delivering cloud-based automation and enterprise AI services. Built end-to-end AI pipelines (data ingestion, retrieval, model integration and APIs) and deployed and scaled services on Azure, handling backend engineering, SQL/NoSQL database design, system integration and Git-based CI/CD.

Developed an AI-powered image-to-text model using OpenCV, OCR and deep learning. Designed and optimized shape, line and text detection to automate flowchart analysis, integrated it with an LLM for AI-driven query responses, and deployed the system with Docker and Flask.

Built deep-learning models for machine-vision systems using PyTorch and YOLOv8. Implemented instance segmentation for product defect inspection and size measurement, covering research, model architecture design, training and performance evaluation.

items.name: EzBot — Enterprise Multi-Agent Knowledge Platform
items.description: An enterprise-scale Agentic RAG platform that routes requests to domain-specific AI agents (workspace, general Q&A, and debug analysis such as BSOD and IFWI). Built with FastAPI and PostgreSQL + pgvector for hybrid vector search over FAQ APIs, Confluence and SharePoint, with an Azure-hosted Claude LLM using tool-calling, orchestrator-based routing, and JWT/OAuth2-secured endpoints.

items.name: BSOD Copilot — AI Windows Crash Dump Analyzer
items.description: An MCP server (FastMCP + FastAPI) that wraps WinDbg/kd.exe as LLM-callable tools to automatically analyze Windows memory dumps. Encodes a kernel-debugging expert's knowledge into 19+ bugcheck-specific guides (0xA, 0x50, 0x133, 0x1CA…) covering root-cause patterns, IOMMU/DMA corruption, power-state failures and hardware faults.

items.name: AgenticBot — Autonomous Validation Assistant
items.description: A ReAct-style autonomous agent that operates Linux validation environments via natural language. Features secure SSH command execution with intent classification, safety validation and human-in-the-loop approval, plus stateful sessions in MongoDB/Redis and an observability layer tracking token usage, latency and outcomes.

items.name: Multimodal RAG for Manufacturing Docs (Final Year Project)
items.description: A production-ready, fully on-premise multimodal RAG backend (FastAPI, Qdrant, MinIO, ColPali, Qwen2.5-VL) that answers questions across PDFs, images, tables and flowcharts. Uses HNSW indexing, metadata filtering and semantic reranking, improving retrieval from O(n) to ~O(log n).

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: I'm open to new opportunities and collaborations — let's get in touch.
